in_domain.question: How many identical layers are stacked in the encoder and in the decoder of the base Transformer?
in_domain.answer: According to the paper "Attention Is All You Need," both the encoder and the decoder are each composed of a stack of **N = 6 identical layers** [1][2].

in_domain.question: What is the name of the attention function the Transformer uses, and why is the dot product scaled?
in_domain.answer:
## Transformer Attention Function

The Transformer uses **"Scaled Dot-Product Attention"** [4].

### Formula
$$\text{Attention}(Q, K, V) = \text{softmax}\left(\frac{QK^T}{\sqrt{d_k}}\right)V$$
